name: DemoOpenWriterExtension
description: Demonstrates the OpenWriter SDK, branded extension assets, and a framework-friendly HTML dashboard panel.
author: OpenWriter

docPanels.title: OpenWriter Demo
docPanels.description: Renders a branded HTML dashboard backed by extension data and commands.

commands.title: DemoOpenWriterExtension: Refresh dashboard
commands.description: Refresh the dashboard snapshot and persist the latest host state.

commands.title: DemoOpenWriterExtension: Log snapshot
commands.description: Write the current host snapshot to the extension log.

commands.title: DemoOpenWriterExtension: Append note
commands.description: Append a branded note to the active document.

commands.title: DemoOpenWriterExtension: Clear state
commands.description: Clear the stored demo state so the dashboard resets.
